endpoints.name: getMovieByIMDBid
endpoints.description: Returns a movie using the films unique IMDB identifier
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{IMDBID}} with a real imdbid.

endpoints.name: getMovieByYear
endpoints.description: Returns a movie based on the year of its release
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{MOVIEYEAR}} with a real movieyear.
